input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.7.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.7.5
            TITLE: any bolt used to attach an anti-submarine belt, directly to the chassis or to an intermediate

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.7.5: Any bolt used to attach an Anti-Submarine Belt, directly to the chassis or to an intermediate
T.2.7.5 Any bolt used to attach an Anti-Submarine Belt, directly to the chassis or to an intermediate 
bracket, is a Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2, with a minimum diameter that is the smaller of: 
• The bolt diameter specified by the manufacturer 
• 8 mm or 5/16”

final_answer: Any bolt used to attach an Anti-Submarine Belt, directly to the chassis or to an intermediate bracket, is a Critical Fasteners, see T.8.2, with a minimum diameter that is the smaller of: • The bolt diameter specified by the manufacturer • 8 mm or 5/16”
